topic.title: 새로운 도시 현지 명소 탐방
topic.description: 새로운 도시에서 현지인처럼 명소를 탐방하며 즐기는 방법을 배웁니다.

korean_scripts.korean_text: 이번 여행에서 이 새로운 도시를 탐험할 생각에 정말 설레요!
저도요! 우리는 현지 명소부터 어디를 가볼까요?
정보를 찾아보니, 오래된 시장에 가면 맛있는 현지 음식을 맛볼 수 있다고 해요.
정말 좋겠어요! 그리고 저는 근처에 있는 유명한 고대 사원도 꼭 보고 싶어요.
아, 좋은 생각이에요! 가이드북에 나온 숨겨진 공원도 방문하면 좋을 것 같아요.
좋아요, 그럼 그렇게 계획을 세워봅시다. 시장부터 시작해서 사원을 둘러보고, 마지막으로 공원에서 휴식하는 거죠.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: I'm really excited to explore this new city on this trip!
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: I'm really excited | to explore this new city | on this trip!

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Me too! Where should we visit first as local attractions?
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Me too! | Where should we visit first | as local attractions?

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: According to the information I found, you can taste delicious local food if you go to the old market.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: According to the information I found, | you can taste delicious local food | if you go to the old market.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: That sounds great! And I really want to see the famous ancient temple nearby.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: That sounds great! | And I really want to see | the famous ancient temple nearby.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Ah, good idea! It would also be nice to visit the hidden park mentioned in the guidebook.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Ah, good idea! | It would also be nice to visit | the hidden park | mentioned in the guidebook.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Okay, then let's make a plan like that. We'll start with the market, look around the temple, and finally relax at the park.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Okay, then let's make a plan like that. | We'll start with the market, | look around the temple, | and finally relax at the park.

keyword_speeches.target_sentence: I'm really excited to explore this new city on this trip!
Where should we visit first as local attractions?
According to the information I found, you can taste delicious local food if you go to the old market.
And I really want to see the famous ancient temple nearby.
It would also be nice to visit the hidden park mentioned in the guidebook.
Okay, then let's make a plan like that. We'll start with the market, look around the temple, and finally relax at the park.
